channel.title: Apurva Desai
channel.description: Cloud engineering, ML, and the occasional rabbit hole.

item.title: Architecting apurvad.xyz: A Systematic Review and Optimization
item.description: A full architecture audit of a multi-tier AWS deployment, cost optimization from $59/mo to $2/mo, and the engineering decisions behind each tradeoff.

item.title: The me-central-1 Incident
item.description: A technical retrospective on infrastructure resilience during the March 2026 physical AWS data center failure in the UAE.

item.title: When DNS Ate the Cloud
item.description: A first-person account of the October 2025 us-east-1 outage. A race condition in DynamoDB's DNS management system took down 70,000+ organizations.

item.title: AI Governance in Smart Cities: Lessons from Prague
item.description: What I learned about governing AI in public infrastructure through the Prague Process simulation with Operátor ICT.
